scenarios.id: Comparison2 - Half-bounded Range-[1] Comparing strings and integers using > in an AND'd predicate
scenarios.description: [1] Comparing strings and integers using > in an AND'd predicate
scenarios.query:
MATCH (:Root)-->(i:Child)
WHERE i.var IS NOT NULL AND i.var > 'x'
RETURN i.var

scenarios.id: Comparison2 - Half-bounded Range-[2] Comparing strings and integers using > in a OR'd predicate
scenarios.description: [2] Comparing strings and integers using > in a OR'd predicate
scenarios.query:
MATCH (:Root)-->(i:Child)
WHERE i.var IS NULL OR i.var > 'x'
RETURN i.var

scenarios.id: Comparison2 - Half-bounded Range-[3] Comparing across types yields null, except numbers [operator=<, lhs=1, rhs=3.14]
scenarios.description: [3] Comparing across types yields null, except numbers [operator=<, lhs=1, rhs=3.14]
scenarios.query:
MATCH p = (n)-[r]->()
WITH [n, r, p, '', 1, 3.14, true, null, [], {}] AS types
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS i
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS j
WITH types[i] AS lhs, types[j] AS rhs
WHERE i <> j
WITH lhs, rhs, lhs < rhs AS result
WHERE result
RETURN lhs, rhs

scenarios.id: Comparison2 - Half-bounded Range-[3] Comparing across types yields null, except numbers [operator=<=, lhs=1, rhs=3.14]
scenarios.description: [3] Comparing across types yields null, except numbers [operator=<=, lhs=1, rhs=3.14]
scenarios.query:
MATCH p = (n)-[r]->()
WITH [n, r, p, '', 1, 3.14, true, null, [], {}] AS types
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS i
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS j
WITH types[i] AS lhs, types[j] AS rhs
WHERE i <> j
WITH lhs, rhs, lhs <= rhs AS result
WHERE result
RETURN lhs, rhs

scenarios.id: Comparison2 - Half-bounded Range-[3] Comparing across types yields null, except numbers [operator=>=, lhs=3.14, rhs=1]
scenarios.description: [3] Comparing across types yields null, except numbers [operator=>=, lhs=3.14, rhs=1]
scenarios.query:
MATCH p = (n)-[r]->()
WITH [n, r, p, '', 1, 3.14, true, null, [], {}] AS types
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS i
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS j
WITH types[i] AS lhs, types[j] AS rhs
WHERE i <> j
WITH lhs, rhs, lhs >= rhs AS result
WHERE result
RETURN lhs, rhs

scenarios.id: Comparison2 - Half-bounded Range-[3] Comparing across types yields null, except numbers [operator=>, lhs=3.14, rhs=1]
scenarios.description: [3] Comparing across types yields null, except numbers [operator=>, lhs=3.14, rhs=1]
scenarios.query:
MATCH p = (n)-[r]->()
WITH [n, r, p, '', 1, 3.14, true, null, [], {}] AS types
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS i
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS j
WITH types[i] AS lhs, types[j] AS rhs
WHERE i <> j
WITH lhs, rhs, lhs > rhs AS result
WHERE result
RETURN lhs, rhs
